2954438.title: Bad Move
2954438.description: Jack Dee and Kerry Godliman star in a comedy series following a husband and wife who make the disastrous decision to move to the country. The couple leave their lives in Leeds behind and head for the countryside, but Steve's business as a website designer faces a problem when he cannot get an internet connection, and Nicky's wish to find some gardening work to tide her over does not go to plan

2958224.title: Bad Move
2958224.description: Jack Dee and Kerry Godliman star in a comedy series following a husband and wife who make the disastrous decision to move to the country. The couple leave their lives in Leeds behind and head for the countryside, but Steve's business as a website designer faces a problem when he cannot get an internet connection, and Nicky's wish to find some gardening work to tide her over does not go to plan

2962181.title: Bad Move
2962181.description: Nicky and Steve discover that their kitchen has flooded and call upon her dad, Ken, for help. However, Steve is convinced that the source of the flooding could be a natural spring, and hopes this could be the answer to all their problems. Meanwhile, Nicky decides that it is time to take a more practical approach to their financial issues, and plans to earn some extra cash by walking a villager's dog. Elsewhere, rock star Grizzo turns up with some alarming news. Comedy, starring Jack Dee and Kerry Godliman

2965796.title: Bad Move
2965796.description: Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered when Grizzo and his band begin rehearsing for the new album outdoors. Noise isn't the only thing keeping him awake though, as his web-design business is quickly losing customers to a rival firm. All the while, Matt and Meena's new venture is only increasing in strength, and Steve is not impressed when the pair seek some free advice on taking their business online. Plus, if the situation was not bad enough, Nicky manages to saddle him with a work-experience boy from the village - who turns out to be none other than the dreaded Bronson.

2965870.title: Bad Move
2965870.description: The couple are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs straight through their garden and a tense stand-off ensues when Steve makes enemies of the ramblers who insist on using it. Meanwhile, Matt and Meena have organised for their children to take part in a sponsored recorder-playing session for the local hospital and are adamant that Nicky and Steve should come along to support it. Comedy, starring Jack Dee and Kerry Godliman

Comedy, starring Jack Dee and Kerry Godliman

3065200.title: Bad Move
3065200.description: Steve and Nicky realise how much they are missing their old lives and the hustle and bustle of Leeds as they fantasise about all the things they could be doing if they hadn't moved. Meanwhile, things go from bad to worse for Nicky as she is conned into taking an old lady from the village to the doctors, and her father Ken wins the meat raffle at the bowls club

3019965.title: Bad Move

Meanwhile, things go from bad to worse for Nicky as she is conned into taking an old lady from the village to the doctors, and her father Ken wins the meat raffle at the bowls club

3023988.title: Bad Move
3023988.description: Nicky and Steve decide to invite their friends from Leeds for a long overdue housewarming party, but word of the celebrations quickly spread around the village and a very different guest list threatens to turn up. The couples neighbours Matt and Meena join in with the preparations, and even Nicky's dad Ken decides to grace the party with his presence
